title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Finolex Industries - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Finolex Industries - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Industries has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Finolex Industries:
Finolex Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries!
